seoTitle: How to Create a Stripe Sandbox Account for Testing
metaDescription: Set up a Stripe Sandbox and test account to try payments, API keys, and integrations safely before switching your store over to live payment mode.
intro: Testing payments before going live is essential for developers and store owners, and Stripe's sandbox tools make that possible without touching real money. This guide covers registering for a free Stripe account, enabling Test Mode, and generating test API keys and sample transactions. It finishes by showing how to switch between Test and Live modes once your integration is ready.

steps.heading: Register for a free Stripe account
steps.body: Sign up for a Stripe account, which is free and gives you access to both live and sandbox testing features.

steps.heading: Enable Test Mode
steps.body: Switch on Test Mode within your Stripe dashboard to unlock sandbox features that don't involve real transactions.

steps.heading: Generate test API keys and products
steps.body: Create test API keys and test products so you can build and run your integration without processing real payments.

steps.heading: Run sample transactions with test cards
steps.body: Use Stripe's test cards to run sample transactions and confirm your payment flow behaves as expected.

steps.heading: Switch from Test Mode to Live Mode
steps.body: Once your integration is verified, toggle from Test Mode to Live Mode so you can begin accepting real payments.

faq.question: Is a Stripe Sandbox account free to create?
faq.answer: Yes, registering for a Stripe account and enabling Test Mode doesn't cost anything.

faq.question: Can I test payments without using real money?
faq.answer: Yes, Test Mode and test API keys let you simulate transactions using Stripe's test cards instead of real funds.

faq.question: How do I switch from testing to accepting real payments?
faq.answer: You switch from Test Mode to Live Mode in your Stripe dashboard once your integration is confirmed to be working.

faq.question: Do test transactions show up in my real Stripe balance?
faq.answer: No, transactions created in Test Mode are separate from live mode and don't affect your real balance.
